payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Dark brown-to-black leather three-seat couch with padded, vertically segmented back cushions, square-quilted lower front panels, visible stitched seams and plush padded armrests; seams and paneling suggest reclining sections. The left side is edge-cropped/partial in the image. Estimated distance from camera ~2.0 meters.
